title: Human Gates, Permissions, and Reversible Autonomy · Goal Brief: Risk Tiering
summary: Set human review points for a consequential operations agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops risk tiering increment in a risk-tiered approval matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify actions by reversibility, blast radius, sensitivity, and external impact.
Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
